headline: Piper Sandler Maintains Neutral on Cincinnati Financial, Raises Price Target to $197
summary: Piper Sandler  analyst Paul Newsome   maintains Cincinnati Financial (NASDAQ:CINF) with a Neutral and raises the price target from $175 to $197.
